articles.title: Who is Golshifteh Farahani? Iranian actress suddenly pulled into French President Emmanuel Macron’s viral ‘slap-gate’ firestorm
articles.description: A new book by journalist Florian Tardif has sparked online debate concerning French President Emmanuel Macron and First Lady Brigitte Macron. Claims within the book suggest private messages were exchanged between Emmanuel Macron and actress Golshifteh Farahani, with some social media users linking this to a viral video of Brigitte Macron. These discussions remain unconfirmed.

articles.title: Kartavya Star Saif Ali Khan On Why Late Father Would Be Happy Seeing His Career Now | Exclusive
articles.description: During an exclusive interaction with Zoom, Saif Ali Khan got candid about what fathers wish for their children. He joked about what his late father, Mansoor Ali Khan Pataudi, would think of him as an actor today.

articles.title: Krishnavataram's Sanskruti Jayana Recalls Getting Emotional At Dwarkadhish: Thanked Satyabhama For Choosing Me | EXCL
articles.description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Krishnavataram’s lead, Sanskruti Jayana, recalled an emotional visit to the Dwarkadhish Temple where she couldn't hold back her tears. Here's what she had to say.

articles.title: Govinda claims the bad publicity against him was ‘pre-planned’
articles.description: Govinda recently opened up like never before during a candid chat with Mukesh Khanna. The actor spoke about turning down big-money film offers, dealing with controversies and bad publicity, as well as how he now reacts to trolling and criticism. Speaking about the time when reports claimed he was not getting work, Govinda revealed that he had actually rejected projects worth Rs 100 crore.

articles.title: Paweł Pawlikowski Returns To Cannes With Fatherland, Receives Standing Ovation
articles.description: Fatherland is set during the Cold War and follows the father-daughter duo on an emotional road trip through post-war Germany

articles.title: Farhan Khan's 'Mujhe Rok Lo' with Kumud Mishra, Sheeba Chaddha out
articles.description: Farhan Khan has released 'Mujhe Rok Lo', the final track of his musical journey, Alif Laila. The song, featuring actors Kumud Mishra and Sheeba Chaddha, explores themes of longing, emotional vulnerability, memory, and self-reflection.

articles.title: Musk's Funny Reactions During China Visit Break The Internet Amid High-Stakes Trump-Xi Summit
articles.description: Elon Musk became an unexpected viral sensation during U.S. President Donald Trump's visit to China after social media users fixated on his facial expressions and playful reactions during official state events. Videos from Beijing showed the Tesla CEO recording ceremonies, reacting animatedly during a formal banquet, and posing for photos while accompanying Trump's delegation meeting Xi Jinping. The clips quickly exploded online, sparking memes and reactions across X.

articles.title: 2 company directors get 3-year imprisonment for defrauding Bank of Baroda of Rs 4 crore in 2013
articles.description: Kanojia brothers Rajesh and Prakash convicted in 2013 Bank of Baroda fraud; 3-year jail, Rs 2 crore fine each for siphoning Rs 4.16 crore.

articles.title: Dhurandhar 2 OTT Release Update: Ranveer Singh's 'Raw and undekha' version to stream worldwide on Netflix, except India
articles.description: Dhurandhar: The Revenge has arrived on OTT with an extended uncensored version titled Raw and Undekha released globally. The new cut includes additional scenes, restored dialogues, and a darker edit, though it is not available for Indian Netflix users.

articles.title: FIFA announces Super Bowl-style halftime show featuring Madonna-Shakira
articles.description: The World Cup final will feature a star-studded halftime show headlined by Madonna, Shakira and boy-band BTS.

articles.title: ‘Diamond of the season’: Alia’s Bridgerton-core Cannes look
articles.description: Alia Bhatt captivated at Cannes 2026 in a custom Tarun Tahiliani saree, blending Indian drapes with a Regency-era flair. The corset-style ensemble, featuring intricate floral work and a dramatic train, drew immediate comparisons to 'Bridgerton.' Celebrities and fans lauded the look as one of her most striking festival appearances, praising its timeless elegance and sculpted structure.

articles.title: James Cameron’s advice to filmmakers
articles.description: In the realm of cinema, James Cameron, a powerhouse in filmmaking, insists that the right cast is crucial, as a misguided choice can taint the entire project. He advises novice directors to embrace the often limited budgets of their first films, while also granting actors the freedom to innovate, as constraining them can lead to uninspired performances.

articles.title: 7 lightweight moisturisers that you'll look forward to using even on the hottest days
articles.description: Our picks to keep skin fresh, calm and hydrated all summer without the greasy finish

articles.description: Following days of speculation, actor Mouni Roy and businessman Suraj Nambiar have confirmed their separation.

articles.description: Sharing insights into the development, the source stated, "TVF's Panchayat, Sapne vs Everyone S2 and others emerged as one of Prime Video's biggest successes in recent times."

articles.title: Nagi Notes movie review: A ruminative marvel
articles.description: SCREEN at Cannes 2026 | It is sometimes not important to know exactly what will happen tomorrow - the definitive is not what Nagi Notes seeks in Nagi Notes - but just the comfort that there will be another day is enough.

articles.title: Glory: Divyenndu Defends Toxic Parent-Child Relationship In Netflix Series - Exclusive
articles.description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Divyenndu reacted to the on-screen toxic relationship he shares with Suvinder Vicky in the recently released show, Glory. Divyenndu is one of his two sons, named Dev.

articles.title: Jon Bernthal's Daughter Addie Joined The Punisher One Last Kill For Special Cameo
articles.description: The Marvel television special sees the return of Jon Bernthal's Frank Castle, aka The Punisher. The special cast Bernthal's daughter Addie for an emotional cameo that almost didn't happen. Find out more below.

articles.title: Mouni Roy, Suraj Nambiar Confirm Split After 4 Years Of Marriage, Vow To Remain Friends - Full Statement
articles.description: Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar have announced they are parting ways, ending their four-year-long marriage. The couple has issued a joint statement on Instagram requesting privacy during these hard times. Read on to know more!

articles.title: Inspired by Vijay’s ‘Thamizhan’, Chennai man donates ₹22,674 to CM Relief Fund
articles.description: Chennai-based Arun Loganathan has been inspired by a Tamil film starring Vijay and has donated ₹22,674 to CM Relief Fund

articles.description: Kerala lottery results today: Kerala State Lottery Karunya Plus KN-623 results for Thursday, 14 May 2026, have been officially declared. Ticket holders can now check their numbers for the ₹1 crore first prize and other attractive cash rewards.

articles.title: Mr X Now Streaming Online: What You Need to Know About This New Arya’s Invisible Spy Thriller Online?
articles.description: Mr X is a Tamil sci-fi action thriller starring Arya, where a betrayed intelligence officer gains invisibility powers after a chemical incident and turns into a vigilante seeking revenge while protecting the nation, blending action, emotion, and suspense as it streams on JioHotstar from May 14, 2026.

articles.title: Madonna, Shakira, and BTS to headline first-ever FIFA World Cup final halftime show
articles.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final is set to become bigger than ever as Madonna, Shakira and BTS have officially been announced as performers for the tournament’s first-ever halftime show. The historic performance will take place during the final match at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on July 19, 2026.

articles.title: How Paul Walker's Sudden Death Changed The Fate Of Fast & Furious 13 Years Ago
articles.description: As Fast & Furious completes 25 years, the 79th Cannes Film Festival featured a special midnight screening as part of the Cannes Classics programme

articles.title: Rahul Dev reveals reason for 'Varanasi' star Mahesh Babu’s ‘Bollywood can’t afford me’ statement: 'Unko zuban nahi aati'
articles.description: Actor Rahul Dev shed light on Mahesh Babu's past 'Bollywood can't afford me' comment, suggesting the superstar might simply be uncomfortable speaking Hindi. Dev believes Telugu cinema's blend of commercialism and sensible storytelling, a mix he feels is missing in Bollywood's current offerings, is the true reason for Babu's focus on regional cinema.

articles.title: Suriya and Trisha’s Karuppu faces release chaos as early morning shows get cancelled despite CM Vijay's approval
articles.description: Several early morning shows of Suriya and Trisha Krishnan’s Karuppu were reportedly cancelled hours before release, leaving fans furious despite Tamil Nadu CM Vijay granting approval.

articles.title: Ped Chalta Hai Director Debaditya Bandopadhyay Calls Cannes Premiere A ‘Moment Of Pride For Jharkhand’ - Exclusive
articles.description: Director Debaditya Bandopadhyay says his film Ped Chalta Hai was inspired by Jharkhand’s forests and people living close to nature. Premiering at Cannes’ Marché du Film, the film explores displacement, belonging and ecological imbalance through an emotionally grounded, human-centric narrative.

articles.title: As 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart' box office touches Rs 12.10 Cr; Hardik Gajjar says he was wary of Raas Leela
articles.description: Director Hardik Gajjar discusses the delicate portrayal of Radha-Krishna's Raas Leela in 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart'. He emphasized maintaining dignity while depicting divine romance, drawing inspiration from scriptures and poets like Vidyapati. The film, which has earned Rs 12.10 crore net, focuses on the emotional depth of Krishna's love, avoiding reinterpretation of mythology.

articles.title: Why fiction still matters
articles.description: Every now and then, we are bound to ask ourselves the same question: why are we still reading novels? The dictionary defines a novel as a relatively long work of narrative fiction. But a definition...

articles.title: Karuppu release status: 9 AM shows of Suriya-Trisha starrer cancelled after CM Vijay grants permission, fans angry
articles.description: Karuppu release status: Suriya and Trisha starrer 'Karuppu,' which is slated to release today, May 14, was supposed to start screening shows from 9 AM after getting permission from CM Vijay. However, the early morning shows were cancelled later. Amid this confusion, fans have expressed their frustration on social media. Read on to know more.

articles.title: From door to ventilation: Bathroom mistakes that can cause problems
articles.description: Bathroom design might not appear to be complicated, but simple mistakes can create problems that can last for a lifetime and cost a fortune to fix. A properly designed bathroom is essential for increasing the property's value and usability.

articles.title: Aadhik Ravichandran and Aishwarya welcome baby boy
articles.description: Director Aadhik Ravichandran and his wife Aishwarya have welcomed a baby boy. This joyous occasion brings happiness to the families of Aadhik and veteran actor Prabhu. Aishwarya delivered the healthy baby boy in a Chennai hospital. Both mother and child are reported to be doing well.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Ed Sheeran: "To be successful at anything, you have to put in a lot of..."
articles.description: Ed Sheeran’s viral quote on success highlights the power of hard work, focus and persistence, inspiring young people to stay dedicated to their goals.

articles.title: Is Diljit Dosanjh Not Indian? Punjabi Singer's US Citizenship Reports Leave Fans Curious
articles.description: Diljit Dosanjh got US citizenship in 2022 and has been travelling on a US passport since September of that year. This has sparked interest because he recently refused demands to enter Punjab politics and is strongly linked with the province.

articles.title: Cannes 2026: Vin Diesel Tears Up Remembering Co-Star Paul Walker, Hugs Daughter Meadow
articles.description: The event also saw Diesel sharing a warm hug with Paul Walker's daughter, Meadow Walker.

articles.title: 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart' box office collections day 8: Hardik Gajjar’s devotional epic holds steady; India Net touches Rs 12.10 Cr
articles.description: Devotional drama 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart' continues its theatrical run, earning Rs 3 lakhs on Day 8, bringing its total net collection to Rs 12.10 crore. The film, a grand retelling of Krishna's life, boasts spectacular visuals and an emotionally rich narrative. Despite a slowdown, it remains a significant devotional offering in cinemas.

articles.title: When Vinod Mehra’s mother picked up sandal to assault Rekha and denied her entry into their home after wedding rumours
articles.description: Vinod Mehra, known for his gentle screen presence and understated performances, remains a familiar name in Hindi cinema long after his passing. Alongside his steady film career, his personal life—particularly rumours about his alleged relationship with Rekha—has continued to keep him in public discussion over the years.

articles.title: Early shows of Trisha Krishnan, Suriya's Karuppu cancelled hours before release despite CM Vijay's approval, fans seethe
articles.description: Karuppu, starring Suriya and Trisha Krishnan, released in theatres on Thursday, but its early shows were cancelled hours prior.

articles.title: Luxury SUV, premium rent, Rs 1.5 lakh EMIs on Rs 1.8 lakh salary: CA warns one missed paycheck could trigger financial crisis
articles.description: A high salary does not guarantee wealth. CA Nitin Kaushik warns that lifestyle inflation erases financial security. Expenses rise with income, leaving little for emergencies. Consistent saving, not just earning, builds true wealth. Even high earners can face crisis with one missed paycheck. Building assets is crucial for long-term financial strength.

articles.title: 'Prempaatta' first look unveiled: Joemon Jyothir leads youthful campus romance; Set during an NSS camp
articles.description: Renowned director Aamir Pallikkal, known for his celebrated films, makes a grand announcement with the reveal of the first-look poster for his new youthful romantic drama, 'Prempatta'. Set against the lively backdrop of an NSS camp, the film delves into the dynamics of college friendships and the excitement of first love, featuring Joemon Jyothir in a pivotal role.

articles.title: Tiger Woods' private jet lands in Florida from Zurich- Is his 'intense' rehab finally over?
articles.description: Tiger Woods has reportedly returned to Florida after spending around 40 days at a rehabilitation facility in Zurich following his DUI arrest and rollover crash in April. While his private jet’s arrival sparked optimism about his recovery, the focus has quickly shifted back to the legal case surrounding the incident. Prosecutors recently gained access to Woods’ prescription drug records, adding another layer to an already complicated situation. Woods has pleaded not guilty and remains away from competition as scrutiny continues both on and off the golf course.

articles.title: Karuppu Review: Is Suriya-Trisha’s Action-Drama Worth the Hype? First Reactions In
articles.description: Karuppu Review: Karuppu is generating internet emotions and industry conversation. The upcoming Tamil action film starring Suriya and Trisha Krishnan is directed by RJ Balaji and produced by Dream Warrior Pictures.

articles.description: Karuppu is facing trouble with release despite, Tamil Nadu CM Vijay approving special screenings. The director of Suriya's film, RJ Balaji has now urged fans to remain hopeful.

articles.title: KPop Demon Hunters world tour officially happening
articles.description: Streaming platform Netflix and live entertainment company AEG Presents announced on Thursday (May 14) that they're collaborating on a KPop Demon Hunters concert world tour.

articles.title: 'Athiradi' Twitter reviews OUT
articles.description: Malayalam action-comedy 'Athiradi' is garnering positive early reviews following its paid premiere shows. Audiences are praising its blend of humor, emotional depth, and commercial elements, with particular excitement surrounding a surprise cameo. The film, starring Tovino Thomas and Basil Joseph, is set for a full theatrical release on May 14.

articles.title: 'Vimal Khanna' Trailer: Sunny Hinduja and Isha Talwar starrer 'Vimal Khanna' Official Trailer
articles.description: 'Vimal Khanna' Trailer: Watch the Official Trailer from Hindi web series 'Vimal Khanna' starring Sunny Hinduja, Isha Talwar, Tara Alisha Berry and Akshay Anand. 'Vimal Khanna' web series is directed by Abhinav Pareek. To know more about the 'Vimal Khanna' trailer watch the video. articles.title: Quarterback Season 3: Who are the four QBs to be featured on Netflix docuseries
articles.description: Netflix’s Quarterback returns July 14 with a cast built around transition, pressure, and reinvention. Baker Mayfield deals with the fallout of Tampa Bay’s late collapse, Jayden Daniels faces soaring expectations after a breakout rookie year, Cam Ward begins his NFL career under intense scrutiny, and Joe Flacco delivers a rare inside look at a veteran navigating a midseason trade. Rather than relying purely on superstar appeal, Season 3 appears focused on the emotional realities behind the NFL’s most demanding position.

articles.title: Abhishek Bachchan's first look from 'King' LEAKED
articles.description: Abhishek Bachchan's villainous first look from 'King' has reportedly leaked online, sparking fan frenzy and frustration over repeated set leaks. The viral image shows him with a shotgun, dressed in a grey overcoat. This follows earlier leaks of Shah Rukh Khan and Suhana Khan's looks. The film, slated for Christmas 2026, is set for a major box office clash.
